mapper.select:
/* selectMcodemList */ SELECT CONCAT(COMCDKY, COMCDVL) AS rowkey , COMCDKY, COMCDVL, COMKYTX, COMCDTX, COMCDOR , COMCDSY, COMMEMO, CDCATE1, CDCATE2, CDCATE3 , CDATTR1, CDATTR2, CDATTR3, COUSEYN, UPDTCHK , DATE_FORMAT(CREDATE,'%Y-%m-%d') AS CREDATE , DATE_FORMAT(STR_TO_DATE(CRETIME,'%H%i%s'),'%H:%i:%s') AS CRETIME , ${userData.schema}.FN_SY_USERNAM(CREUSER) AS CREUSER , DATE_FORMAT(LMODATE,'%Y-%m-%d') AS LMODATE , DATE_FORMAT(STR_TO_DATE(LMOTIME,'%H%i%s'),'%H:%i:%s') AS LMOTIME , ${userData.schema}.FN_SY_USERNAM(LMOUSER) AS LMOUSER FROM ${userData.schema}.MCODEM
AND UPPER(COMCDKY) LIKE UPPER(CONCAT('%', #{param.comcdky}, '%'))
AND UPPER(COMCDVL) LIKE UPPER(CONCAT('%', #{param.comcdvl}, '%'))
AND UPPER(COMKYTX) LIKE UPPER(CONCAT('%', #{param.comkytx}, '%'))
AND UPPER(COMCDTX) LIKE UPPER(CONCAT('%', #{param.comcdtx}, '%'))
AND COUSEYN = #{param.couseyn}
ORDER BY COMCDKY, COMCDOR ASC
